# Platform Notes: LinkedIn Ads

## Best uses

- B2B role pain
- Founder-led POV
- Case studies
- Technical proof

## Agent rules

- Use precise job/role pain
- Prefer clear operator POV over generic brand copy
- Use proof and relevance to reduce enterprise risk

## Required campaign artifact sections

- Objective
- Buyer state
- Tactic
- Offer
- Creative/copy variants
- Landing page
- Metrics
- Launch notes
- Learning update path
